title: Phase 23 — Linkable Asset Conversion Check

assets.name: Mortgage Affordability Widget
assets.current_page_quality: Functional. Widget renders correctly. Embed iframe code visible.
assets.embed_code_clarity: GOOD — copy-paste iframe provided. Clear instructions.
assets.publisher_use_cases: ADDED in Phase 22: 3 use cases (real estate agent blog, mortgage broker, personal finance blogger).
assets.privacy_no_signup_messaging: Implied by no-form design but NOT explicitly stated on page. FIX: add 'No signup. No personal data stored. Your readers' privacy is protected.'
assets.internal_links: Linked from mortgage-calculator and mortgage-affordability calculator pages.
assets.pitch_angle: Free mortgage affordability calculator your readers can use without leaving your site.
assets.why_publisher_would_care: Saves readers from leaving their site. Adds interactive value to mortgage/home-buying content. Increases time-on-page.
missing_conversion_elements: Explicit no-signup/no-data-collected statement on widget page
Preview/screenshot of the widget on a real blog post
Testimonial or social proof (even 'used by X finance bloggers')
Clear 'How to add this to your site' step-by-step with screenshots

assets.name: Debt Snowball vs Avalanche Widget
assets.current_page_quality: Functional. Widget renders. Embed code available.
assets.publisher_use_cases: ADDED in Phase 22: 3 use cases (debt payoff blog, credit counseling site, personal finance YouTuber).
assets.privacy_no_signup_messaging: Same gap as mortgage widget — not explicitly stated.
assets.internal_links: Linked from debt-snowball and debt-payoff calculators.
assets.pitch_angle: Free debt payoff comparison tool — snowball vs avalanche. No signup. Embed in 30 seconds.
assets.why_publisher_would_care: Debt payoff is a high-engagement topic. Interactive calculator keeps readers on-page. Readers can personalize the strategy.
missing_conversion_elements: Side-by-side preview showing snowball vs avalanche on the same page
Customizable colors/branding option (even basic: 'we can match your site colors')

fixes_needed: Add 'No signup. No personal data stored.' messaging to both widget pages
Add a screenshot preview section showing how the widget looks embedded
Add step-by-step embed instructions with visual cues
Offer basic color customization as outreach differentiator
priority: MEDIUM — widgets are good but no publisher has used them yet. Conversion elements (trust messaging, previews) may help when combined with outreach.
